'''Raal Panteer''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] who hailed from the blue-blooded [[House Panteer]] and was fortunate enough to be absent from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] at the time of its [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]]. He, along with his brother [[Heeth Panteer|Heeth]], were in the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]], where they owned a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] due to being the only heirs of their family. The moon was rather inhospitable for [[Human/Legends|Human]] life, but they lived well. It possessed a large collection of Alderaanian flora and fauna, and was also set aside as a hunting preserve.

==Biography==
In the wake of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], a childhood friend of the brothers, traveled to the moon in hopes of convincing the brothers to let the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] use it as their new base. Raal didn't care for the Rebellion much, though he did care for Leia, and proposed that she stay on the moon with him and together they could preserve a bit of Alderaan together.

When Raal took Leia on a tour through the wild preserve, they failed to return. Heeth sought them out—and eventually found Raal [[Death/Legends|dead]], bitten by a [[morp]]. Enraged, he refused to help the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and ordered Leia to leave the moon. And after that, their relationship ended.
